---
title: "Siddharth Tumre"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:siddharth.tumre@outlook.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/siddharthtumre
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/siddharth-tumre/
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/siddharth_tumre
comments: false
---

<style>
#hero-heading p {
  text-align: justify;
}

@media (max-width: 991.98px) {
  #hero-heading p {
    text-align: center;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 991.98px) {
    div.quarto-about-solana .about-entity .about-links {
        flex-direction: row;
        column-gap: .8em;
        row-gap: 0.8em;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 4px;
        padding-bottom: 1.2em;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 991.98px) {
    div.quarto-about-solana .about-entity .about-link {
        font-size: 0.8em;
        padding: .25em .5em;
        text-align: center;
        border-radius: 6px;
    }
}

#mapmyvisitors {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 5em;
}

</style>

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a Researcher at [TCS Research](https://www.tcs.com/what-we-do/research) with experience across a range of natural language processing (NLP) tasks, including text classification, named entity recognition, semantic textual similarity, information extraction, and natural language generation using state-of-the-art statistical, discriminative, and generative models.

My research interests center on grounded reasoning, knowledge representation, and the integration of structured knowledge into foundation models. More recently, I have been exploring knowledge graphs and reasoning, especially natural language to graph query language translation. I am also exploring speech technologies, with a focus on automatic speech recognition (ASR) for disordered speech.

[_View Full Curriculum Vitae →_](CV1104.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

## Education

**Indian Institute of Technology Delhi**
: M.Tech in Computer Technology | 2021–2023

**Chaitanya Bharathi Institute of Technology**
: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering | 2017–2021

## Experience

**TCS Research (_TRDDC_)**
: Researcher | September 2023 - present


```{=html}
<script type="text/javascript" id="mapmyvisitors" src="https://mapmyvisitors.com/map.js?cl=ffffff&w=a&t=tt&d=jaNtobhqzZmbV68S5H6GYw3ETcKT5i5rmeHlXdX2PCQ&co=2d78ad&ct=ffffff&cmo=3acc3a&cmn=ff5353"></script>
```

:::
